mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources ( user_id, title, description, file_url, file_size, file_type, category_id, download_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{categoryId}, #{downloadCount}, #{likeCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, description, file_url, file_size, file_type, category_id, download_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resources SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE status != 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT id, user_id, title, description, file_url, file_size, file_type, category_id, download_count, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{resourceId}
